title: buglossoides calabra
intro: Buglossoides calabra, also known as Blue Bugloss or Calabrian Bugloss, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Buglossoides calabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Buglossoides calabra can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
